arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta offers worrying Bukayo Saka update for Liverpool clash after latest absence
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is facing a race against time to be available for Arsenal's clash with Liverpool and Mikel Arteta is not confident about having his forward back from injury

arts.ttl: Adidas have given Liverpool major breakthrough in Trent Alexander-Arnold talks - Kieran Maguire view
Merson Says: Arsenal need to find calm or risk 'major trouble' vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Paul Merson questions if Arsenal can overcome their latest blip to restore faith in a sustained title chase this season, with table-topping Liverpool lying in wait on Super Sunday, while also heaping praise on Arne Slot's 'outstanding' start.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp Liverpool return point made with 'uncomfortable' RB Leipzig admission
arts.sum: Liverpool take on RB Leipzig in the Champions League on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends ominous warning to Liverpool rivals despite Diogo Jota blow
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot previewed his side's match against RB Leipzig and discussed the Reds' form and injury status ahead of Wednesday's Champions League outing in Germany

arts.ttl: Arsenal blow as Arteta delivers Saka injury update ahead of Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta left Bukayo Saka out of his starting lineup to face Shakhtar Donetsk – and he may not recover from his injury in time to face Liverpool. The winger didn’t feature for the Gunners at the weekend when they tasted defeat for the first time this season, losing 2-0 away to Bournemouth […] The post Arsenal blow as Arteta delivers Saka injury update ahead of Liverpool first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Dominik Szoboszlai knows the importance of his ‘dirty job’ with Liverpool
arts.sum: The Reds have had a solid start to the season under Arne Slot.

arts.ttl: Dominik Szoboszlai 'won't answer' Liverpool question anymore as midfielder 'does the dirty job'

arts.ttl: Team News: RB Leipzig vs. Liverpool injury, suspension list, predicted XIs

arts.ttl: Benitez praises 'fantastic' Jones performance for Liverpool
arts.sum: Watch as former Liverpool and Chelsea manager Rafael Benitez analyses Curtis Jones' match-winning performance during the Reds' 2-1 victory against the Londoners which kept them top of the Premier League table.
